_comment: Bootstrap Fase 1 minima: 4 riviste OA + 5 autori-chiave + 5 query anchor del piano-studio. OpenAlex IDs verificati il 06/05/2026 via api.openalex.org/sources?search=... e .../authors?search=...

journals.name: Forests (MDPI)
journals.note: MDPI continuous publication ~2000 paper/anno — filtraggio aggressivo via scoring

journals.name: iForest - Biogeosciences and Forestry (SISEF)
journals.note: rivista italiana SISEF, OA gratuita, accademicamente solida

journals.name: npj Urban Sustainability (Springer Nature)
journals.note: high-tier journal Springer Nature, ~50 paper/anno — alta qualità

journals.name: Forest@ Rivista di Selvicoltura ed Ecologia Forestale (SISEF)
journals.note: rivista italiana in italiano + EN abstract — dibattito tecnico-pratico nazionale

authors.name: Henrik Sjöman
authors.affiliation: SLU Swedish University of Agricultural Sciences
authors.note: scelta specie urbane, stress tolerance — ~70 works

authors.name: Francesco Ferrini
authors.note: VTA + arboricoltura urbana, fisiologia stress alberi — ~279 works
